title: Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Srinagar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute!
